scripts.vetilib: npm --prefix ./db run db && npm-run-all migrateDB seed && npm-run-all --parallel startBackend startFrontend
scripts.installProject: npm --prefix ./backend install && npm --prefix ./frontend install && npm --prefix ./e2e-tests install  && npm --prefix ./shared install
scripts.build: npm --prefix ./backend run build && npm --prefix ./frontend run build && npm --prefix ./shared run build
scripts.buildProject: npm --prefix ./backend install && npm --prefix ./frontend install && npm --prefix ./e2e-tests install && npm --prefix ./shared install && npm --prefix ./shared run build
